In a world of consumption, I want to create.
I design and build things — physical and digital.

about

This is my corner of the internet — a place to gather the things I make and the ideas I'm chasing. Most of what I know is self-taught, picked up by making things and seeing what sticks — 3D prints, software, AI, signage, cyberdecks, visuals and graphics — whatever I'm curious about. It's less about any single craft and more about the pull of creating and exploring for its own sake. Think of it as a garden more than a gallery — always growing, never quite finished.

3D print · dimensional signage

“Scratch” Signage 2025

Dimensional signage for the Scratch music collective — the wordmark and ring, modeled from their logo and 3D-printed in sections, roughly three feet wide.

3D print · cosplay

Custom Cosplay Helmet 2025

Multi-part 3D-printed sci-fi helmet — printed, sanded, primed, and spray-painted in a two-tone forest-green and gunmetal finish.
